# Aafaque Nazir — Web Developer & AI Engineer

> Freelance web developer and AI engineer based in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.
> Website: https://aafaque.in
> Email: aafaquenazir@gmail.com
> WhatsApp: +91 93256 29256

## About

Aafaque Nazir is a freelance web developer and AI engineer based in Navi Mumbai, India. He specializes in building high-performance websites, AI-powered SaaS platforms, intelligent chatbots, and interactive 3D web experiences using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, and AI/ML technologies.

## Services & Pricing

- **Full-Stack AI Web Apps** — AI-powered SaaS platforms, intelligent dashboards, admin panels, and custom portals built with Next.js, React, OpenAI API, and secure backends. Starting from ₹24,999 (~$300 USD).
- **Lead Generation Websites** — Conversion-focused, SEO-optimized, premium animated websites with fast load times and mobile responsiveness. Starting from ₹14,999 (~$180 USD).
- **Ecommerce Website Development** — Custom ecommerce stores, Shopify alternatives, product catalogs, payment gateway integrations (Razorpay/Stripe), inventory management, and order tracking systems. Starting from ₹24,999 (~$300 USD).
- **Interactive 3D Websites** — Immersive WebGL and Three.js experiences with 3D environments and physics-based interactions. Starting from ₹29,999 (~$360 USD).
- **AI Chatbot & Automation** — Custom ChatGPT-powered chatbots, AI customer support systems, content generation tools, and workflow automation. Starting from ₹19,999 (~$240 USD).

## Technical Skills

React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Node.js, AI/ML, OpenAI API, LangChain, ChatGPT Integration, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Framer Motion, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Firebase, MongoDB, Three.js, WebGL, Git, Vercel, SEO Optimization.

## Location & Availability

- Based in: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- Serves: Navi Mumbai, Mumbai, Pune, Thane, all of India, and worldwide remote clients
- Available: Monday–Saturday, 9 AM – 9 PM IST
- Languages: English, Hindi, Urdu
